title: Roasted American Potato Bowl
description: A hearty vegetarian bowl filled with roasted potatoes and topped with smoky roasted vegetables.

ingredients.name: Smoky Roasted Vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as bell peppers and zucchini

instructions: Cut potatoes into 1-inch cubes and toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast potatoes in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and golden brown.
While potatoes are roasting, toss smoky roasted vegetables with olive oil, salt, and pepper on a separate baking sheet.
Roast vegetables in the oven for 10-12 minutes, or until tender and slightly caramelized.
To assemble the bowl, place roasted potatoes on the bottom, followed by roasted vegetables and topped with chopped cilantro.
